---
title: "Mise en place d'un nouveau service de codification à l'Insee"
subtitle: "Journée Grandes Enquêtes - Mars 2026"
# institute: INSEE
# author: Vous
date: 2026-04-25
date-format: "DD/MM/YYYY"
description: |
  Slides pour la presentation a Progedo

slide-tone: true # for blind readers
chalkboard: false # press the B key to toggle chalkboard
jump-to-slide: true #press "g" to jump and the number of slide
mouse-wheel: false
transition: slide
fig-cap-location: bottom

embed-resources: false

custom-toc: true

# multiplex: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  cache: false
editor:
  render-on-save: true

params:
  annee: "2026"
  codeDepartement: "92"
  codeRegion: "11"
  typeEquipement: "G103"
---

<!-- Ajout des parties du support -->

{{< include 01_contexte.qmd >}}

{{< include 02_outils.qmd >}}

{{< include 03_fonctionnement_service.qmd >}}

{{< include 04_resultats.qmd >}}

{{< include 05_perspectives.qmd >}}

## {#pageDeFin data-menu-title="Page finale" .unnumbered .backgroundPageFinale}

:::: {.columns .coordonneesFinales}

::: {.column .coordonnees width=50%}
- Yves Coltier
- Responsable de la méthodologie <br> du codage automatique
- Division Recueil et traitement <br> de l’information
- 01 87 69 55 53
- yves.coltier@insee.fr
:::

::: {.column .droite width=40%}
:::

::::
